novel_features.name: Channel Health Report
novel_features.description: See which channels are thriving and which are dying with messages/day, response times, and active poster counts
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating messages, users, and channels across the full local archive

novel_features.name: Response Time Analytics
novel_features.description: Measure how fast your team responds to messages and threads in any channel
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating message and reply timestamps across all threads in SQLite

novel_features.name: Offline Digest
novel_features.description: Get a daily or weekly summary of activity, mentions, and action items across all channels
novel_features.rationale: Requires local message archive with mention extraction and thread analysis

novel_features.name: Stale Thread Radar
novel_features.description: Find unanswered threads that need attention before they go cold
novel_features.rationale: Requires scanning all thread timestamps in the local message store

novel_features.name: Channel Activity Trends
novel_features.description: Track channel activity over time to spot patterns and shifts
novel_features.rationale: Requires historical message counts from the local SQLite archive

novel_features.name: Quiet Channel Detector
novel_features.description: Find channels with no recent activity that may be candidates for archiving
novel_features.rationale: Requires comparing last message timestamps across all synced channels

novel_features.name: User Activity Summary
novel_features.description: See where a team member is active across channels, threads, and reactions
novel_features.rationale: Requires cross-channel per-user analytics from the local store

novel_features.name: Funny Digest
novel_features.description: Weekly humor roundup from public channels, ranked by joy and rofl reaction counts
novel_features.rationale: Requires reaction-weighted message scoring across all public channels in SQLite
